main.name: main
main.text:
Overview
Our approach to safety

How ourdream thinks about trust, moderation, and the limits of what we build.

ourdream is a generative platform for AI characters, operated by Dream Studio USA, Inc. (a Delaware corporation). Most of what people make on it is adult creative work: characters, scenarios, roleplay, the kind of thing that has lived in private notebooks and online forums for decades. T

content.text: ourdream is a generative platform for AI characters, operated by Dream Studio USA, Inc. (a Delaware corporation).
